item.title: Imgur made me a custom avatar so I etch a sketched it
item.description: It's hard to properly express gratitude while trying to etch something in under a minute so hopefully I'll be a little more eloquent here: It's been a pleasure and an honor to share my love for this nifty toy with you - my fellow Imgurians - for these past 11 years. Thanks as always for your overwhelming support! I hope you enjoyed my frenetic gratitude in video form.
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Christina Ricci got a star on the walk of fame, my dudes
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Raising class consciousness one meme at a time

1
2
3 The people united shall never be defeated
4
5
6
7
8
9
10 No wonder the super rich guy went all out to stop him
11
12
13
14 The difference is that socialism gives people education and health care
15

23 spotted in Texas

45 https://open.spotify.com/episode/1Fym6YW4MxfH9LHMLEhMNE
46
47
48
49 1/3
50 2/3
51 3/3
52
53 This is the sort of thinking we're up against in the class war: 'Gurner Group founder Tim Gurner tells the Financial Review Property Summit workers have become "arrogant" since COVID and "We've got to kill that attitude."'
54 'Gurner Group founder Tim Gurner tells the Financial Review Property Summit workers have become "arrogant" since COVID and "We've got to kill that attitude."' from https://twitter.com/FinancialReview/status/1701440109948887057
55
56
57
58 Start with your friends, co-workers and neighbours. United grassroots action gets results.
59
60
61
62
63
64
65
66 cat
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
not nicotine anymore.. greetings online friends
wtf i didn't even do anything
mmm hmm
not all guys can pull off the bald look tho
maybe get some free grooming here and here
having all the accoutrements is kinda important too
i guess
gross
radcliffe has done some funny/interesting work recently
as is tradition
great song
this is about as political of a meme that i will post. sorry
seems like a believable character arc
gif of the guy about to say something then stops
abacus salesman?
i knew it
that's deep
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Happy ending

item.title: Rockabilly Subculture in Tokyo
item.description: Centered around Yoyogi Park in Tokyo, various "roller" clubs meet to put on shows for passersby and engage in friendly competition with one another
item.dc:creator: samuelwestphalia

item.title: 'Culture isn't free snacks. It's how Monday feels.'
item.description: Mv edit - I'm not an employee, but I do know what it means to be underpaid and be an entry-level employee with years of experience. Yes, I'm a writer. You are some of my stories, they're free through Saturday. https://inkican.com/smashwords-spring-scifi-free-short-stories/
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Brennan Lee Mulligan laying it down... (with sound)
item.description: Apparently there is something called hopecore and this is pretty great. Tiny octopus hopes you enjoy this edit that has absolutely nothing to do with current events, and is just a flashback to an old season of Fantasy High from D20.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1293 (tortilla chair)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This to me is just frigging wild.
The horrors persist, but so do I.
The internet in a nutshell.
I've heard magnolia petals are edible and taste good. I wonder if I could make them into a tea, and therefore into a mead.
But Antarctica is the question.
Yeah, this tracks.
Water again is falling from the sky, thank goodness.
Awebo is a pretty good transcription of the bizzare sounds ptarmigans make. I also feel like this should maybe be Canada's new flag right now?
Corvids are amazing.
Have a good day, the duck offers it.
I mean, I've seen stranger ways to cook tortillas.
The Paleologoi dynasty was a frigging mess.
I love this idea.
This is honestly one of my favorite vintage pieces of Paleoart.
I'm. I'm not sure you could take this critter for a walk. Also, think of this as a preview: Sunday's theme dump is going to be paleo-themed.
Yeah this tracks.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too. Hi Pippin! Peekaboo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Nazis love 'both sides' arguments...
item.description: Artist is Stephen Collins at https://stephencollins.bsky.social Artist website: https://www.stephencollinsillustration.com/
item.dc:creator: bl0ke

item.title: Some heroes wear cleats
item.description: Back story: The woman on the right is Lia Thomas. She tied Riley Gaines for 5th place in a NCAA 200 yard freestyle swimming meet. Since then Riley has made barrels of money doing performative transphobia for willing, bigoted audiences because of losing literally nothing to what she describes as a "biological male". The big tragedy is that she tied for 5th. She didn't even lose fifth place, she tied for it. In other words, if Lia wasn't even there, LITERALLY NOTHING would be different. She would have scored fifth place, graduated and then moved onto a life of average obscurity after getting her degree in health sciences. She planned to "become a dentist". Whether that was true, she has found it much more lucrative to profit off dogpiling onto an tiny minority.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Real dog and marionette puppy play together
item.dc:creator: amerxp00

item.title: What Happened Today - #34
item.description: The type IS smaller. And we still had to cut some news. We're at a crossroads on what it means to be America and American. Don't forget today's science rallies in 32 cities. Spread the word. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links: 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/trump-administration-must-pay-debts-usaid-partners-monday-judge-rules-rcna195248 2 - https://www.reuters.com/business/tariff-reprieve-likely-be-extended-all-usmca-compliant-goods-lutnick-says-2025-03-06/ 3 - https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5179829-judge-blocks-trump-omb-freeze/ 4 - https://www.frommers.com/trip-ideas/national-park/full-list-of-34-national-park-leases-cancelled-parks-being-dismantled-before-our-eyes/ 5 - https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5180939-trump-considers-extending-tiktok-ban/ 6 - https://www.hrdive.com/news/federal-judge-reinstates-fired-nlrb-member-gwynne-wilcox/741848/ 7 - https://apnews.com/article/house-censure-green-trump-joint-address-61d82026983c99a269209bbeb32b45a5 8 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/doge-targets-child-support-database-full-of-income-data/ar-AA1AotGu 9 - https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/toronto/ontario-electricity-surcharge-us-tariffs-ford-1.7476515 10 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/06/trump-republicans-amy-coney-barrett-dei-supreme-court/81843688007/ 11 - https://www.axios.com/2025/03/06/trump-perkins-coie-security-clearances 12 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/06/gavin-newsom-trans-people-sports 13 - https://newrepublic.com/post/192442/doge-marocco-sued-us-marshals-takeover-usadf-agency 14 - https://edition.cnn.com/2025/03/05/business/musk-usps-amtrak-privatization/index.html 15 - https://www.nbcwashington.com/news/local/trump-says-dc-must-clear-unsightly-homeless-encampments/3860501/ 16 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/06/treasury-secretary-bessent-says-the-american-dream-is-not-about-access-to-cheap-goods.html 15 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5181461-trump-msnbc-nicolle-wallace-rachel-maddow/ FIGHTING BACK - https://standupforscience2025.org/ Archive - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
